name: companion-v2
description: Companion v2 — self-hostable portal to deploy, govern, and share AI agents, containers, and skills.

scripts.compose:up: docker compose up -d postgres minio mailpit minio-init
scripts.dev:app: pnpm exec concurrently -k -n api,web "COMPANION_API_HOST=${COMPANION_API_HOST:-127.0.0.1} pnpm --filter @companion/api dev" "pnpm --filter @companion/web dev --hostname ${COMPANION_WEB_HOST:-127.0.0.1} --port ${COMPANION_WEB_PORT:-3000}"
